items.title: The thing that annoys me the most about the NBA draft is we all know the Milwaukee Bucks just drafted Nate Ament and not the Miami Heat. Yet five years from now when I search Milwaukee Bucks draft pick history on various websites, Nate Ament will not appear as he will be under He
items.author: Hoop Informatics
items.body_excerpt: The thing that annoys me the most about the NBA draft is we all know the Milwaukee Bucks just drafted Nate Ament and not the Miami Heat. Yet five years from now when I search Milwaukee Bucks draft pick history on various websites, Nate Ament will not appear as he will be under Heat draft picks.

images.alt: Nate Ament drafted by the Miami Heat. NOT! Damn you NBA. Just let him where the Bucks hat and let this be recorded in the data as a Bucks pick.
